steps.title: Undo division by 42
steps.content: The equation is $$\frac{r}{42}=s+t$$ To isolate $r$, multiply both sides by $42$.

steps.title: Solve for r
steps.content: $$r=42(s+t)$$ Keep $s+t$ in parentheses because the $42$ multiplies the entire right side.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C (‘$r=42 \left(s+t\right)$’) is $r=42(s+t)$, so it is correct. The other choices add or subtract $42$, and an incorrect response divides by $42$ again instead of undoing the division.
